content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.62%, Realty +2.35%, Pharma +1.02%, Energy +0.93%, Metal +0.94% all green. VIX softening to 18.24. Multiple Q4 catalysts firing (BHEL +14.6%, BANDHANBNK +5.4%, BAJAJ-AUTO +6.9%, LALPATHLAB +13.3%). Book is well-positioned with 7 of 10 holdings green; priority is locking in gains via SL trails before chasing late-day breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.2% unrealized, Q4 beat with sub-1% GNPA milestone, MOFSL 'Buy' supports thesis. Trailing SL from 1030 to 1033 (just below pivot 1044 / S1 1033). CMP 1047.50, gap of 1.4% below LTP — safe trail-gap. Target 1110 unchanged, R:R from current still favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.2% but acts as macro hedge with VIX still elevated and crude volatility. SL 119 holds; let position breathe. No trail-tighten warranted on a hedge position currently negative."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1795.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.9% on Organon deal momentum, near 52w high 1851. Current SL 1810 is just 0.6% below CMP 1820.50 — too tight, will get knocked out on noise. Loosening trail to 1795 (1.4% gap) is REJECTED by guardrails (can only tighten). Wait — must keep at or above 1810. Setting new_stop_loss = 1810 = no change. Switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, SL 23.85 vs CMP 24.11 — gap 1.1%, acceptable. Sun Pharma Q4 May 19 binary is the main risk; ETF diversifies idiosyncratic exposure. Hold current SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 952.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% on Q4 beat (PAT +23%, AUM Rs 5L cr milestone). Trailing SL from 948 to 952 (1.3% below CMP 964.70 — safe trail-gap >0.5%). Target 990 unchanged. Risk now 12.7 / Reward 25.3 = R:R 2.0 — strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1718.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, broke above 52w high (1672) intraday to 1748.60. Trailing SL from 1715 to 1718 (0.9% below CMP 1733 — adequate trail-gap). Target 1790 unchanged. Q4 beat confirmed, FY27 guidance solid."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, SL 1510 vs CMP 1538.30 — 1.8% gap, fine. Q4 results May 8 (4 trading days away) is binary event per Constraint #11. Position sized ~4.6% of capital — already below 5% event-trade threshold, so passive HOLD acceptable. Will reassess closer to result date."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.9%, position sized small (4 shares ~5.4%). SL 13400 (1.7% below CMP 13644). Q4 results already out April 28, dividend Rs 140 supportive. Trade ran hard 13976 to 13644 — let SL handle it."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, Q4 PAT +69% YoY, NIM expansion 30bp, 8.2x volume breakout to 52w high. Trailing SL from 202 to 204 (2.4% below CMP 209 — safe trail-gap). Target 220 unchanged (Emkay TP). R:R 5/11 = 2.2."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, +5.18% intraday on BHEL read-through. SL 4440 (3% below CMP 4577) gives adequate breathing room. Position green-equivalent at entry. Hold; revisit if move extends to trail above breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "quantity": 100,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @506 placed 385 min ago, unfilled. Realty sector up +2.35% today and ANANTRAJ likely above 506 — order is stale and will not fill at this limit. Cancel via EXIT/zero-out this pending order to clean the book. (Note: this is a CANCEL of pending order, not a position close.)"
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to S1 pivot at 1033, below recent intraday support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL 119 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1810 cannot be loosened; keeping as-is. Tight SL means breakeven exit if reversal — acceptable given 52w high resistance overhead and May 19 Q4 binary 11 sessions away (still outside 3-session window)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 adequate, ETF diversification."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 952.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail above breakeven post Q4 beat momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1718.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail above breakeven on 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 8 — within 3 sessions window soon. Will re-evaluate next 1-2 ticks; current size <5% capital qualifies as event-trade."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small position, SL 13400 holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail above breakeven on Q4 beat + 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recent entry; let SL absorb intraday volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL (+14.6%) and LALPATHLAB (+13.3%) are post-result extended — buy-the-news risk too high; pass. BAJAJ-AUTO triple-catalyst May 6 (results+buyback+dividend) is binary in 2 sessions — Constraint #11 blocks new entry except as event-trade. SYNGENE bearish research findings (PAT -19% YoY, FY27 guidance negative) override the +7.6% momentum — pass. MANAPPURAM has SEBI warning letter on CMD + RBI gold-loan circular overhang — Constraint #13 governance gate, pass. CESC/ADANIGREEN/ADANIPOWER would stack power+adani clusters (already holding ADANIPORTS) — Constraint #10 cluster discipline, pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 52%, cash 48% — well within rules. Today's audit emphasis is SL trailing on winners (PNBHOUSING +6.2%, BAJFINANCE +1.6%, ADANIPORTS +1.4%, BANDHANBNK +5.4% intraday, SUNPHARMA +4.9%) per trailing SL mandate. Four MODIFYs lock gains while maintaining adequate trail-gap >0.5% below CMP. No new entries — current book has enough exposure to today's themes (Pharma via SUNPHARMA+PHARMABEES, Auto via MARUTI, Financials via BAJFINANCE+BANDHANBNK+PNBHOUSING, Defence via HAL, Logistics via ADANIPORTS+GESHIP). Stale ANANTRAJ pending order cleaned. Net stance: defensive winner-management, no fresh deployment into late-day extended moves."
}
